use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in any web application
Navigation action triggers with visual hover feedback
Form submission and interactive button elements
CTA sections requiring animated button interactions
ai_summary: A minimalist dark-themed button component featuring an expanding hover effect that reveals an animated arrow. Built with Tailwind CSS using neutral color palette, the button has a clean flat design with smooth CSS transitions that animate the background width on hover. The expanding element provides clear visual feedback for user interaction.
